entity: Steve Nash career regular-season total assists = 10,335 (BBR). Warehouse SUM(avg_ast*gp) undercounts at 10,062 (delta 273)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_ast * gp)) AS career_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 959 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 10,062 AST but BBR's official Steve Nash career regular-season assist total is 10,335. The 273-assist gap is consistent with the same agg_player_season gap seen for Stockton and Malone. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 10,335.
